title: GPT 5.6 is out… but not for you lol
summary: David Ondrej discusses the release of GPT 5.6, highlighting that it is not yet widely available to the general public. The video appears to cover the gap between the announcement and actual user access to the model.
writeup: David Ondrej covers the release of GPT 5.6, focusing on the gap between the announcement and actual availability to the general public. The video notes that the model is not yet widely accessible despite being out. The takeaway centers on the distinction between a model being released and users being able to reach it.
